
# STRATOSYNC Unified Architecture v1.1
Date: 2026-02-18

## Definition
STRATOSYNC is a Modular Strategic Intelligence Architecture integrating:
Human × Business × Organization × Scenario × Alignment × Executive Synthesis.

---

## Layer Structure

### Layer 0 — Core Orchestrator
- Execution control
- Data flow management
- Version control
- Audit logging
- Report synthesis

### Layer 1 — Human Intelligence Engine (AXIS Core internalized)
- Decision Vector (7D)
- Bias Detection
- Risk Posture Index
- Decision Stability Score

### Layer 2 — Business Intelligence Engine (QCS internalized)
- Revenue Stability Index
- Growth Sustainability Index
- Market Dependency
- Key-Person Dependency

### Layer 3 — Organizational Dynamics Engine
- Role Fit
- Friction Probability (Logistic Model)
- Dependency Index
- Hotspot Extraction

### Layer 4 — Scenario Branch Engine
- Multi-axis normalization
- Pareto Frontier
- Switching Threshold Analysis
- Conditional Scenario Evaluation

### Layer 5 — Strategic Alignment Engine (Mode 6)
- Strategy-Person Fit
- Leadership Stretch Indicator
- Organizational Resilience Index

### Layer 6 — Executive Synthesis Engine (Mode 7)
- Executive Health Score
- Strategic Risk Map
- Human Capital Stability
- 90-Day Action Grid

---

## Dependency Flow

Human Engine ┐
Business Engine ├──→ Org Engine ──→ Scenario Engine ──→ Alignment ──→ Synthesis
Org Engine    ┘

Core Orchestrator supervises all layers.

---

## Version Positioning

v1.0 — Functional Completion  
v1.1 — Structural Unification  

All modules are internally modular but externally unified under STRATOSYNC branding.
